pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Stay Puft Marshmallow Man (Costume Version) 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Stay Puft Marshmallow Man (Costume Version) 400%. This Be@rbrick features the iconic Be@rbrick shape but with a special twist- there's a costume!  The Stay Puft Marshmallow Man made his debut in the 1984 film Ghostbusters and has since become a historic and memorable character, not just for the Ghostbusters series of films but for movies. The Stay Puft Marshmallow man has become synonymous with the Ghostbusters-style of 80's comedy, representing how sometimes even innocent things, under the right circumstances, can be terrifying!  This collectible figure stands over 11 inches tall.  Add to your collection today!
